spec_match.rationale: Editor listens on `beforeinput`, `paste`, and `drop` and routes file items from `dataTransfer.items` into inline `` / `

interactive.rationale: Editor is live for real IME, paste, and drop paths, and desktop visitors can now fire the same beforeinput/dataTransfer handler through GIF, PNG, and WebP simulation buttons.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now matches the page: Android users can use a real keyboard, while desktop users can use simulation buttons or drag and drop.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles image/* and video/*, loops over multiple items, rejects non-media entries visibly, differentiates beforeinput/paste/drop sources in the log, and revokes generated object URLs when media nodes are removed.

design_system.rationale: Variables-only colours, no glyph icons, button overrides not applicable (no styled buttons on the page).

summary: The sticker drop demo is now hands-on on desktop: simulation buttons dispatch beforeinput events carrying image DataTransfer items through the same insertion handler, and generated object URLs are revoked when media nodes are removed.
